pr.title: Int6 mixed quant + MLP 3x + sliding window eval (val_bpb 1.1741)

output.summary: Combines int6 per-row quantized MLP+attention with 3x FFN expansion and sliding-window eval under a tuned Muon optimizer schedule.
techniques: int6 per-row quantization on MLP and attention weights with fp16 tied embedding passthrough
MLP hidden size ramped to 1536 for 21.8M params under a 4096-context seq_len
sliding-window evaluation (stride 64) plus Muon momentum warmup/warmdown
